seoTitle: Sladevale vs Smithlea — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sladevale and Smithlea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sladevale and Smithlea.
heading: Sladevale vs Smithlea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sladevale, Queensland and Smithlea, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Smithlea has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Sladevale (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sladevale or Smithlea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sladevale has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Smithlea scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sladevale scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Smithlea scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sladevale or Smithlea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Smithlea has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
